personas.name: Technical Issues
personas.description: A frustrated user experiencing technical issues with the meditation app, such as crashes and slow performance.
goals: To use the meditation app without technical issues
To access and download content smoothly
context: Uses the app for meditation and relaxation
May have tried troubleshooting steps without success
constraints: Dependence on the app for mental wellness

personas.name: Subscription and Payment Issues
personas.description: A user frustrated with the app's subscription model and payment issues.
goals: To access meditation content without excessive costs
To manage subscription and payment easily
pain_points: Lack of transparency in payment and subscription details
context: Values affordability and flexibility in subscription services
May be sensitive to price changes and unexpected charges
constraints: Expectation of clear and fair pricing

personas.name: Content and Features
personas.description: A user interested in a variety of meditation content and features.
goals: To access diverse and engaging meditation content
To use features that enhance meditation practice
pain_points: Lack of features to personalize meditation experience
context: Values variety and quality in meditation content
Seeks features that support a personalized meditation practice
constraints: May have specific preferences for meditation content
Expects content to be engaging and relevant

personas.name: Negative Experience and Support
personas.description: A user dissatisfied with their experience with the app and its support.
goals: To resolve issues with the app
pain_points: Lack of responsiveness to user concerns
context: Expects effective support and resolution of issues
May have had previous positive experiences with similar apps
constraints: Expects empathy and understanding from support

personas.name: Positive Experience
personas.description: A user satisfied with their experience using the meditation app.
goals: To continue using the app for meditation and relaxation
To explore more features and content
context: Values the app for its positive impact on mental wellness
May recommend the app to others
